transcript.clean_text: gray skies and the ominous threat of rain with tumbling temperatures did not diminish the anticipation ahead of this mighty stage on lavuelte destination kovadonga an oppensive mood amongst the pack before we got going hardly surprising today's course a mighty one the first of back to back stages including a special finish this though up to kovadonga one of the legendary tests of la weltep well two category one climbs before we even reach that point and a category three that would demand a breakaway well the pace was such and indeed the danger of a breakaway going all the way but so many teams had an option and as a result we looked like we were having a sprint for the entire day caruso and bardet duked it out for mountains points at the very first test but really it was the high ground that would pose many questions but who would have the answers trenton looks like he's bidding for a place in the world championship team for italy and we had various incarnations of various sides of breakaway and some great individual performances as well michelander looked to be back at his best which bowed very well for bahrain victorious store looking good as well hoovering up some mountains points not so good for this man odd christian eye king in red starting to struggle and when the rain came and indeed the climbs and the descents started to look a bit more treacherous and of course it was to take some big bites out of plenty of ambitions the pace really was what accounted for most disappointing performances in the gloom a bright effort by bernal he pushed on with 60 kilometers to go who would be strong enough or willing to follow him just one man primos roglic well it was a fighting force of two but how long would the alliance last they were sharing their duties beautifully and pushed away from a group including all of the pre-race favorites the chase well engaged fully by bahrain victorious they were trying so will movistar but to what avail burnout on one of the descents a warning for him having to unclip i need a warning that should have been heeded by others odd christian niking taking a tumble and finding others fallen including blasoff well the red jersey was already virtually off the shoulders of iking and on to those of primos roglic but working with burnout but now was taking a big leap over his rivals who were in the chasing group so what would lopez do what would mass do guillotine had hoped to hang on to second place at least especially with old christian iking taking a tumble he went backwards and so ultimately did burnout roglich pushed on glory in his mind a third stage win and as emphatic a statement of his prowess as you're likely to see so who would push on out of that group of favorites and mcmasters looked lively likewise his teammate miguel anger lopez would they catch bernal almost the ultimate slap in the face after a superb effort he was indeed wound in and it was sepcus that wanted to make it a one two four jumbo visma we knew that roglich was going to take the day but by what margin in the end it was a handsome one he roared at the gray sky almost with disdain and it was a three-up sprint for the line bigger longer lopez adam yates and sep curse who hoovered up the second place bonus seconds making sure they were denied to the rivals of his teammate roglic adam yates with a good finish likewise jack hague but king of the hill primus rockledge well a superb performance underscoring his greatness which all the other riders did acknowledge because his teammate in second place head of megalangle lopez adam yates jack hague mass bernal in seventh head of mada menkis and chapusa oh chrissy niking bravely home but nine minutes and more in arrears it was goodbye to the red jersey but said later he'd had fun so did primos ruglitch today the man in red and in control of this race with yet another stage win he leads by two minutes and 22 ahead of mass and lopez who have to make a move on stage 18. bernal's efforts to move up the order coming to naught on the day but what a brave try it was adam yates in seventh place four minutes and 45 down head of course and gross hartner who fell today and did well to make his way back in so on to the gomentiero another looping stage and another special finish they call it the sister of the angloru let us see whether that is true it certainly looks a real test so who is going to set the questions for roglich to answer we should wait and see another great day on the welter awaits
transcript.preview_start: gray skies and the ominous threat of rain with tumbling temperatures did not diminish the anticipation ahead of this mighty stage on lavuelte destination kovadonga an oppensive mood amongst the pack before we got going hardly surprising today's course a mighty one the first of back to back stages including a special finish this though up to kovadonga one of the legendary tests of la weltep well two category one climbs before we even reach that point and a category three that would demand a break
transcript.preview_end: the order coming to naught on the day but what a brave try it was adam yates in seventh place four minutes and 45 down head of course and gross hartner who fell today and did well to make his way back in so on to the gomentiero another looping stage and another special finish they call it the sister of the angloru let us see whether that is true it certainly looks a real test so who is going to set the questions for roglich to answer we should wait and see another great day on the welter awaits
